# Captain of Gondor ◆

> [!danger] ⚔️ Attachment · Cost: **1** · Tactics

![[08140.png]]

*Title.*

---

Attach to a **_Warrior_** hero.
**Response:** After you optionally engage an enemy, exhaust Captain of Gondor to give attached hero +1 ATK and +1 DEF until the end of the round.
